AccidentHotspot.description: A single accident hotspot zone returned by KOROAD getRestFrequentzoneLg.
AccidentHotspot.title: AccidentHotspot

GugunCode.description:
District (gu/gun) codes for KOROAD accident data API (guGun parameter).

Because district code integers overlap across sido (multiple sido use code 110
for their Jung-gu), member names are qualified with the sido prefix.

Source: koroad_AccidentHazard_CodeList.md § Gugun 요청값
GugunCode.title: GugunCode

SearchYearCd.description:
Year/category codes for KOROAD accident dataset queries (searchYearCd parameter).

The numeric string values are the official API parameter values.
Source: koroad_AccidentHazard_CodeList.md § serachYearCd 요청값
SearchYearCd.title: SearchYearCd

SidoCode.description:
Province/city codes for KOROAD accident data API (siDo parameter).

Codes 42 (Gangwon-do) and 45 (Jeonbuk) are legacy codes valid only for
pre-2023 datasets. Use 51 (강원특별자치도) and 52 (전북특별자치도) for 2023+.
SidoCode.title: SidoCode

description:
Input parameters for the koroad_accident_search tool.

Cross-validates legacy sido codes against modern search year codes.

gu_gun.description: 3-digit 시군구 code for the KOROAD guGun wire parameter. Required by the KOROAD API. MUST be derived from a prior resolve_location geocoding tool call on the user-provided location string — never fill this from model memory. [WIRE FORMAT] siDo is 2-digit (e.g. '11'=서울), guGun is 3-digit (e.g. '680'=강남구). Do NOT use 4-digit 행정구역코드 (e.g. '1100', '1168') — the API rejects them. Empirical counter-example: a Korean-domain LLM produced gu_gun=110 (Jongno) instead of gu_gun=680 (Gangnam) for a '강남역' query because it guessed from memory rather than consulting geocoding. Valid codes are defined in the GugunCode enumeration; codes are specific to the paired si_do value.

num_of_rows.description: 결과 행 수 (default 10, max 100). 보통 기본값.
num_of_rows.title: Num Of Rows

search_year_cd.description: 사고 통계 연도 / 카테고리 코드 (KOROAD searchYearCd wire param). 보통 직전 연도 사용 (당해 데이터는 매년 6월 이후 publish). valid 값은 SearchYearCd enum 참조.

si_do.description: 2-digit 광역시도 code for the KOROAD siDo wire parameter. MUST be derived from a prior resolve_location geocoding tool call on the user-provided location string — never fill this from model memory. [SHORT REFERENCE] 서울=11 부산=12 대구=22 인천=23 광주=24 대전=25 울산=26 세종=27 경기=13 강원=14 충북=15 충남=16 전북=17 전남=18 경북=19 경남=20 제주=21. Empirical counter-example: a Korean-domain LLM produced gu_gun=110 (Jongno) instead of gu_gun=680 (Gangnam) for a '강남역' query because it guessed from memory rather than consulting geocoding. Valid codes are defined in the SidoCode enumeration.

title: koroad_accident_search
